---
title: "Education"
subtitle: "We believe in open education and open science" 
listing:
  contents:
    - courses/env-hydrocarbon/index.ipynb
    - courses/hydrolearn-ds-ees/index.ipynb
    - courses/ear-419-environmental-aqueous-geochemistry/index.ipynb
    - courses/ear-400-ml-ees/index.ipynb
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-item-border: true
  grid-item-align: left
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  table-hover: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
sidebar: false
---

These pages collect public teaching materials, online modules, and course notebooks developed by the WEN Research Group. Some Syracuse University course pages include semester-specific schedules or Blackboard references; the public materials remain available for learners, collaborators, and instructors interested in adapting open education resources.

Courses and modules span environmental geochemistry, hydrocarbon-related water quality, Earth and environmental data science, and machine learning for Earth systems.
